items.hook: EU approves Paramount’s takeover of Warner Bros Discovery with conditions
items.body: Paramount agrees to end United International Pictures (UIP) film distribution joint venture with Universal Pictures.

items.hook: Saga 105.7fm was an Independent Local Radio station broadcasting to the West Midlands of the United Kingdom.
items.body: As well as the West Midlands County, it also served surrounding areas such as Worcestershire, Staffordshire, and Warwickshire. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: The 100 best novels of all time
items.body: The top 100 novels of all time published in English, as voted for by authors, critics and academics worldwide. How many have you read?

items.hook: Georgian organisations claim state festivals are being hijacked by “authoritarian regime”
items.body: Top Georgian groups say international guests are being used as “useful idiots”.

items.hook: The Old Man is a stand-alone thriller novel by Thomas Perry, published by the Mysterious Press imprint of Grove Atlantic in January 2017.
items.body: A television adaptation of the same name starring Jeff Bridges aired on FX beginning June 2022. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Godzilla vs Kong actor Kaylee Hottle dies aged 18
items.body:
The deaf actor, who played a major role in Godzilla vs Kong and its 2024 sequel, was killed in a car crash in Maryland

items.hook: The Night of the Devils is a 1972 film directed by Giorgio Ferroni.
items.body: It is loosely based on the Aleksey Konstantinovich Tolstoy's novel The Family of the Vourdalak. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The McSweeney-McNary Act of 1928 is an article of American legislation that was enacted on May 22, 1928.
items.body: The law created the directive to implement "…a comprehensive survey of the present and prospective requirements for timber and other forest products of the United States." The Act was sponsored by Senator Charles L. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Penrod and Sam is a novel by Booth Tarkington that was first published in 1916.
items.body: it is set pre-World War I. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: In order to engage in successful social interaction, people must be able to remember how they should interact with one another, whom they have interacted with previously, and what occurred during those interactions.
items.body: Memory supports and enables social interactions in a variety of ways. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Charles Gaines, whose book Pumping Iron helped to popularize bodybuilding, dies at 84
items.body:
1974 book led to making of seminal documentary and introduced Arnold Schwarzenegger to the world

items.hook: Dawn is a children's fantasy novel, the third book in the Warriors: The New Prophecy series.
items.body: Dawn was written by Kate Cary under the pen name of Erin Hunter. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Kayunga–Busaana–Nabuganyi Road in the Central Region of Uganda connects the town of Kayunga to the town of Nabuganyi, on the western bank of the Victoria Nile, adjacent to the Isimba Hydroelectric Power Station.
items.body: One of those things you can't un-know.
